_meta.description: Daily 8:00 AM — scans all git repos in ~/projects for uncommitted changes. Silent if all clean. Fires Telegram alert if any repos are dirty.
setup: Credential 'Nexus Telegram Bot' must be configured with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_IOPEX
Variable TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID must be set in n8n Settings → Variables
SSH credential 'Maverick WSL Host' must be configured (ssh-maverick)

parameters.command: bash -lc 'find ~/projects -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r git_dir; do repo_dir=$(dirname "$git_dir"); st=$(git -C "$repo_dir" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$st" ] && echo "$repo_dir"; done; echo "EXIT:0"'
